name: Third-Party Preparer Integration and UEI Update
description:
You are acting as a third-party environmental consultant (Sarah Jenkins at EcoCompliance Partners LLC) tasked with finalizing a client's Tier II report. The client, Apex Precision Manufacturing, has provided a draft Tier II submission file but it is missing their new federal SAM.gov Unique Entity ID (UEI) and your preparer contact information. 

1. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application, import the client's draft file from: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\apex_draft.t2s
2. Open the facility record for 'Apex Precision Manufacturing'.
3. In the Facility Identification section, locate the Unique Entity ID (UEI) field and enter their 12-character UEI: L9KLM2B8N1X5
4. Navigate to the Contacts section and add yourself as a new contact with the following details:
   - Contact Type: Tier II Information Contact
   - Name: Sarah Jenkins
   - Title: Senior Environmental Consultant
   - Company: EcoCompliance Partners LLC
   - Email: sjenkins@ecocompliance.example.com
   - Phone: 555-019-8372
5. Save the updated facility record.
6. Export the finalized facility record as a Tier2 Submit file (.t2s) to: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\apex_final_2024.t2s
